purpose: Define governance rules for no_source rows that cannot be traced to the current Ni Haixia corpus.
boundary: This policy is traceability governance only. It does not validate medical truth, efficacy, diagnosis, prescription, dosage, acupuncture operation, or treatment advice.
forbidden_actions_without_manual_review: promote external rows to verified_direct or verified_contextual
mix external source_refs with nihaixia source_refs without source_scope
add dosage, contraindication, pregnancy, pediatric, emergency, or treatment claims from unsourced text
